buckets.description: Questions testing the concepts of conduction and insulation, and how factors like material type, surface area, or trapped air affect the rate of heat transfer.
Questions focusing on melting, freezing, boiling, and evaporation, often involving the interpretation of temperature-time graphs that show plateaus during these processes.
Questions involving the expansion of solids, liquids, and gases when heated and their contraction when cooled, including real-world applications and consequences.
Questions that test the fundamental definitions of heat and temperature, the correct use of thermometers, and the relationship between heat energy, mass, and temperature change.

otherSamples.reason: There is no question stem provided to determine the sub-topic.
